summary: Activities crash fix verified end-to-end. The <SelectItem value='all'> sentinel fix resolved the React crash. All 11 backend tests passed (activity-types GET/POST, activity-logs CRUD + filter by type/player/location, auth guarding). Full frontend flow verified on preview URL: Activities page renders (no blank screen, 0 page errors), Log Activity dialog opens and creates log (Padel @ Test Arena, 45min, players UIAlice/UIBob) - log card appears, Search filter by player works, Clear (X) button resets, Delete removes log, Add New Sport adds custom type. Social category fix is PARTIAL: the create/edit dialogs correctly hide Target per Session + Unit fields, but the HABIT LIST DISPLAY still shows target_per_session + unit for Social habits in both HabitsManage.jsx and HabitsToday.jsx.

ui_bugs.issue: Social category habits still render '<target_per_session> <unit>' (e.g., 'Call Friends - 1 count - 7x/week') in the list view. Spec says these fields must NOT be visible for Social anywhere. The dialogs were fixed but the list card else-branch was not.
ui_bugs.selector: line 437-442 in /app/frontend/src/pages/HabitsManage.jsx (the else branch that renders {habit.target_per_session} {habit.unit})

ui_bugs.issue: getTargetDisplay() unconditionally renders 'Target: {target_per_session} {unit}' for non-supplementation habits, including Social. The 'Target:' label with count+unit appears for social habits like Call Friends/Message Friends. Per spec, Target/Unit must NOT be visible for Social.

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/pages/HabitsManage.jsx around line 437-442, wrap the target_per_session/unit <span> with a condition `habit.category !== 'social'` (similar to how dialog already does).

In /app/frontend/src/pages/HabitsToday.jsx, hide the 'Target: ...'

when habit.category === 'social' (or conditionally render getTargetDisplay only for non-social).
critical_code_review_comments: Activities.jsx crash fix (value='all' sentinel) is correct per Radix Select requirements.
Backend activity-logs endpoint correctly joins activity_type_name via in-memory map; filter regex for player/location is case-insensitive.
Social category hide rule was applied in 2 of 4 places (create dialog + edit dialog in HabitsManage), but list renderer in HabitsManage and HabitRow in HabitsToday were missed.
server.py is 856 lines — consider splitting routers per domain (auth, todos, habits, activities) for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Activities flows all pass; Social hide rule partially implemented)

test_credentials: Fresh users created per test via POST /api/auth/register. Sample: test_act_ui_<timestamp>@test.com / Test1234.
seed_data_creation: Each fresh user auto-seeds 4 default activity types (Padel/Poker/Pickleball/Squash) and default habits across all categories via seed_default_data().
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activities page crash is fully resolved. Backend API for activities is 100% green. If retesting after main agent fixes the Social list display bug, verify: (1) HabitsManage.jsx Social tab list cards do NOT show 'X count' next to '7x/week', (2) HabitsToday.jsx rows for Call Friends / Message Friends do NOT render 'Target: 1 count' subtitle, (3) Existing non-social habits still show target+unit correctly.
rca of the issue: Original Activities crash RCA: Radix/shadcn Select rejects SelectItem with value=''. Fix (value='all' sentinel + handleSearch/clearSearch updates) confirmed working. Remaining Social P1 bug RCA: the 'hide Target/Unit for Social' rule was only applied in the create + edit dialog conditionals (lines 238 and 524 in HabitsManage.jsx). The list card render (line 437-442) and HabitsToday's HabitRow target display (line 279-292) were not updated to include the same category guard.
